basic_details.job_title: THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Head Cook, Assistant Cook and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
basic_details.short_information: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) Head-Cook (Supervisor), Cooks, Assistant Cook Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of THSTI. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the THSTI Head-Cook (Supervisor), Cooks, Assistant Cook Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess Diploma/Certificate Course in Hotel Management/Catering/Food Production qualifications are eligible to attend the walk-in interview for these vacancies. The walk-in interview for THSTI Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 19 May 2026 at the designated venue mentioned in th

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Certificate Course in Hotel Management/Catering/Food Production
qualification.details: Head-Cook (Supervisor): Degree in Hotel Management/Catering/ Food Production with 1 Year of relevant experience OR Two Year Diploma in Hotel Management/Catering/ Food Production with 2 Years of relevant experience OR One Year Diploma/ Certificate Course in Hotel Management/Catering/Food Production with 3 Years of relevant experience Cooks: Two Year Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/ Food Production OR One Year Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production with 6 months of relevant experience OR Six months Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production with 1 year of relevant experience Assistant Cook: One Year Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production OR Six months Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production with 1 year of relevant experience

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by THSTI?
faq.answer: THSTI has released a total of 7 vacancies for the posts of Head-Cook (Supervisor), Cooks, and Assistant Cook.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the THSTI posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 35,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 19 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Assistant Cook post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Cook post, a One Year Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production or a Six months Diploma/Certificate Course in Catering/Food Production with 1 year of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the THSTI located?
faq.answer: THSTI is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these positions is contractual.
